svg.title: Nemotron OCR v2 benchmark chart
svg.text: 1× NVIDIA A100-SXM4 80GB · 30,000 JPEG-byte requests · 1,000 Bo767 pages × 30 · infer_length=1024 · trailing 15s rolling means
Official NVIDIA/HF in-process: direct NVIDIA/HF in-process pipeline · vLLM baseline: JPEG → one native vLLM /pooling queue · Optimized native vLLM: dispatcher → eight MPS vLLM replicas
Seconds since first sustained GPU-active sample
Alignment gate: first ≥20% sample starting a 5s window with mean ≥20% and ≥60% active samples; raw trace tail retained.
